docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,336.12 FILED BY L & S GENERAL CONTRACTORS IINC. AS TO DEFENDANT ECHO WEST INC.  MOHAMMED HAQ, PRES. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MOHAMMED HAQ RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF APR-10-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ECHO WEST INC.  MOHAMMED HAQ, PRES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF L & S GENERAL CONTRACTORS IINC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ECHO WEST INC.  MOHAMMED HAQ, PRES. $1,168.06 PRINCIPAL, $34.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,202.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ECHO WEST INC.  MOHAMMED HAQ, PRES.
